'''tafuku''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:roachicide|roachicide]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-f-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:roachicide|roachicide]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| tafuku
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæfikith|tæfikith]] || [[word:tæfikij|tæfikij]] || [[word:tæfikish|tæfikish]] || [[word:tæfiki|tæfiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tafufukuth|tafufukuth]] || [[word:tafufukuj|tafufukuj]] || [[word:tafufukush|tafufukush]] || [[word:tafufuku|tafufuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tafukuth|tafukuth]] || [[word:tafukuj|tafukuj]] || [[word:tafukush|tafukush]] || [[word:tafuku|tafuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tafufkuth|tafufkuth]] || [[word:tafufkuj|tafufkuj]] || [[word:tafufkush|tafufkush]] || [[word:tafufkuf|tafufkuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tafukuthu|tafukuthu]] || [[word:tafukuju|tafukuju]] || [[word:tafukushu|tafukushu]] || [[word:tafukuku|tafukuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tafukuth|tafukuth]] || [[word:tafukuj|tafukuj]] || [[word:tafukush|tafukush]] || [[word:tafuku|tafuku]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tafukuthul|tafukuthul]] || [[word:tafukujul|tafukujul]] || [[word:tafukushul|tafukushul]] || [[word:tafukukul|tafukukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tafukuthuthu|tafukuthuthu]] || [[word:tafukujuju|tafukujuju]] || [[word:tafukushushu|tafukushushu]] || [[word:tafukuku|tafukuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tafukuthun|tafukuthun]] || [[word:tafukujun|tafukujun]] || [[word:tafukushun|tafukushun]] || [[word:tafukukun|tafukukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tafukuthuoro|tafukuthuoro]] || [[word:tafukujuoro|tafukujuoro]] || [[word:tafukushuoro|tafukushuoro]] || [[word:tafukukuoro|tafukukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
